MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kenneth Frucht (392.4844) for plaintiff and moving party
Melynnie Rizvi of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith (362.2580) for defendants and responding parties

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF JOELL JONES MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is denied. The delay in seeking the amendment is unreasonable and no explanation has been offered. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/AY) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
